mechanics.excerpt: Also character repeats path or subpath that awards field, that character receives an additional +3 Skill Points to all the skills in that field_ UBING EDGE IN THE Life PATH Because every player character iS unique individual, play: ers will most Vlkely want to sidestep the standard rules at some point during the Life Path_ Use the following special Edge rules when you want your character to go somewhere that the Life Path technically doesn allow, when the dice conspire against you_ Edge and Path Restrictions Sometimes character can get into path through sheer Iuck , even he lacks the appropriate prerequisites To do this_ however; the character must use up some luck.
